question: Will the 4-week moving average of initial unemployment claims have increased by 2026-03-22 as compared to its value on 2026-03-15?
resolution_criteria:
Resolves to the value found at https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/IC4WSA once the data is published.

The exact value on 2026-03-15 is unknown, but the most recent known value (as of 2026-03-06) was 215750.000. (The latest value released in 4-Week Moving Average of Initial Claims from the release Unemployment Insurance Weekly Claims Report.)
background: The notes from the release: N/A.  The notes from the series: An initial claim is a claim filed by an unemployed individual after a separation from an employer. The claim requests a determination of basic eligibility for the Unemployment Insurance program..  Additional background of the series:  1. the units of the series: Number.  2. the seasonal adjustments of the series:  Seasonally Adjusted  3. the update frequency: Weekly, Ending Saturday
